briefdescription.para: FRL Character Rate Enumeration.
FRL Character Rate Enumeration.

FRL Character Rate Enumeration.
FRL Character Rate Enumeration.
This table contains the values to be programmed to TI device.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Device Type 2) Register Address 3) Values

briefdescription.para: This table contains the values to be programmed to TI device.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Device Type 2) Register Address 3) Values

briefdescription.para: This table contains the values to be programmed to TI device.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Device Type 2) Register Address 3) Values

briefdescription.para: This table contains the values to be programmed to TI device.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Device Type 2) Register Address 3) Values

briefdescription.para: This table contains the values to be programmed to TI device.

detaileddescription.para: Each entry is of the format: 1) Device Type 2) Register Address 3) Values

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *MsgPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_I2cSend

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to TI_TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the data to be sent.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u16 SlaveAddr, u8 *BufPtr, unsigned ByteCount, u8 Option)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_I2cRecv

briefdescription.para: This function send the IIC data to TI_TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: IIC instance pointer.
contains the 7 bit IIC address of the device to send the specified data to.
points to the memory to write the data.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
indicates whether to hold or free the bus after transmitting the data.

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI TMDS1204.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_Init

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the TI TMDS1204 with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the revision number of the TI device.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the TI TMDS1204 device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the TI TMDS1204 Device Revision Number.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *IicPtr, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Revision, u8 IsFRL, u64 LineRate, u8 Lanes, u8 IsTx)
memberdef.name: TI_TMDS1204_LineRateReconfig

briefdescription.para: This function reconfigures the TI TMDS1204 cable redriver.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
is the revision number of the TI device.
specifies if the mode is FRL or TMDS.
specifies the linerate.
specifies if the configuration is for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function prints out all the contents from TiRegisterFields array.
This function displays a registerdump of the TI TMDS1204 device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
